attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SDCH.CLAIM_ID,
SDCH.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
SDCH.PROMO_TYPE,
SDCH.CLAIM_TYPE,
SDCH.CLAIM_AMT,
SDCH.CURRENCY_CODE,
SDCH.CLAIM_HEADER_STATUS,
SDCH.CLAIM_CREATED_DATE,
SDCH.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SDCH.CREATED_BY,
SDCH.CREATED_DATE,
SDCH.UPDATED_BY,
SDCH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SDCH.POS_TRANS_TYPE,
SDCH.CLAIM_BUSINESS_STATUS,
SDCH.CCO_STATUS,
SDCH.CREATE_DATETIME,
SDCH.BATCH_ID,
SDCH.ACTION_CODE,
'RI',
SDCH.DISTI_PROVIDED_CLAIM_REF_NUM,
SDCH.EXPIRED_CLAIM,  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
SDCH.AUTO_VALIDATE   /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_CLAIM_HEADER SDCH
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CBS 
WHERE NDCD_CBS.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CLAIM_BUSINESS_STATUS AND NDCD_CBS.DCC_TYPE='CLAIM BUSINESS STATUS')
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CCO
WHERE NDCD_CCO.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CCO_STATUS AND NDCD_CCO.DCC_TYPE='CCO_STATUS')
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CHS
WHERE NDCD_CHS.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CLAIM_HEADER_STATUS AND NDCD_CHS.DCC_TYPE= 'CLAIM STATUS')
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CT 
WHERE  NDCD_CT.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CLAIM_TYPE AND NDCD_CT.DCC_TYPE='CLAIM TYPE')
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOO
WHERE SDCH.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID=NPOO.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT)

SELECT 
EDCH.CLAIM_ID,
EDCH.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
EDCH.PROMO_TYPE,
EDCH.CLAIM_TYPE,
EDCH.CLAIM_AMT,
EDCH.CURRENCY_CODE,
EDCH.CLAIM_HEADER_STATUS,
EDCH.CLAIM_CREATED_DATE,
EDCH.ACTIVE_FLAG, EDCH.CREATED_BY,
EDCH.CREATED_DATE, EDCH.UPDATED_BY,
EDCH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
EDCH.POS_TRANS_TYPE,
EDCH.CLAIM_BUSINESS_STATUS,
EDCH.CCO_STATUS,
EDCH.CREATE_DATETIME,
EDCH.BATCH_ID,
EDCH.ACTION_CODE,
EDCH.DISTI_PROVIDED_CLAIM_REF_NUM,
EDCH.EXPIRED_CLAIM,    /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
EDCH.AUTO_VALIDATE   /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DCA_CLAIM_HEADER EDCH
WHERE EDCH.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT 
SDCH.CLAIM_ID			AS BK_CLAIM_ID_INT,
SDCH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE	AS SOURCE_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
SDCH.CREATED_DATE		AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
CASE 
	WHEN SDCH.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y' THEN 'N'
	WHEN SDCH.ACTIVE_FLAG='N' THEN 'Y'
END 					AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLAG,
SDCH.CREATED_BY			AS CREATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER,
SDCH.UPDATED_BY			AS UPDATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER ,
SDCH.CLAIM_CREATED_DATE	AS DISTI_CLAIM_CREATED_DTM,
SDCH.CLAIM_BUSINESS_STATUS	AS DISTI_CLAIM_DISTI_STATUS_CD,
SDCH.CCO_STATUS			AS DISTI_CLAIM_SMPLFD_STATUS_CD,
SDCH.CLAIM_HEADER_STATUS	AS DISTI_CLAIM_STATUS_CD,
SDCH.PROMO_TYPE			AS BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
SDCH.POS_TRANS_TYPE		AS POS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
CASE
	WHEN SDCH.CLAIM_TYPE='CREDIT' THEN 'CR'
	WHEN SDCH.CLAIM_TYPE='DEBIT' THEN 'DR' 
END 					AS CLAIM_CR_DR_TYPE_CD,
SDCH.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID 	AS WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
SDCH.CURRENCY_CODE 		AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
NCWP_CRTD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 	AS CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
NCWP_UPDT.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 	AS UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
CASE 
	WHEN SDCH.CLAIM_HEADER_STATUS='DCA ASSIGNED' AND EDD.BK_CLAIM_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN EDD.BK_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_ID_INT
	ELSE -999
END 					AS BK_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 	AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER					AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)	AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER					AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(SDCH.DISTI_PROVIDED_CLAIM_REF_NUM, 'UNKNOWN') AS DISTI_PROVIDED_CLAIM_REF_NUM,
COALESCE(SDCH.EXPIRED_CLAIM,'N') AS EXPIRED_FLG,  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
COALESCE(SDCH.AUTO_VALIDATE,'N') AS AUTOVALIDATE_FLG  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */

FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_CLAIM_HEADER SDCH

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CBS 
ON NDCD_CBS.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CLAIM_BUSINESS_STATUS AND NDCD_CBS.DCC_TYPE='CLAIM BUSINESS STATUS'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CCO
ON NDCD_CCO.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CCO_STATUS AND NDCD_CCO.DCC_TYPE='CCO_STATUS'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CHS
ON NDCD_CHS.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CLAIM_HEADER_STATUS AND NDCD_CHS.DCC_TYPE= 'CLAIM STATUS'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CT 
ON NDCD_CT.BK_DC_CD=SDCH.CLAIM_TYPE AND NDCD_CT.DCC_TYPE='CLAIM TYPE'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOO
ON SDCH.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID=NPOO.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION_TYPE NDPT
ON NDPT.BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD=SDCH.PROMO_TYPE

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_CRTD
ON NCWP_CRTD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS=SDCH.CREATED_BY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_UPDT
ON NCWP_UPDT.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS=SDCH.UPDATED_BY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DCA_DETAILS EDD
ON EDD.BK_CLAIM_ID_INT=SDCH.CLAIM_ID

SELECT 
SDCH.CLAIM_ID,
SDCH.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
SDCH.PROMO_TYPE,
SDCH.CLAIM_TYPE,
SDCH.CLAIM_AMT,
SDCH.CURRENCY_CODE,
SDCH.CLAIM_HEADER_STATUS,
SDCH.CLAIM_CREATED_DATE,
SDCH.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SDCH.CREATED_BY,
SDCH.CREATED_DATE,
SDCH.UPDATED_BY,
SDCH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SDCH.POS_TRANS_TYPE,
SDCH.CLAIM_BUSINESS_STATUS,
SDCH.CCO_STATUS,
SDCH.CREATE_DATETIME,
SDCH.BATCH_ID,
SDCH.ACTION_CODE,
'NE',
SDCH.DISTI_PROVIDED_CLAIM_REF_NUM,
SDCH.EXPIRED_CLAIM, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
SDCH.AUTO_VALIDATE  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_CLAIM_HEADER SDCH
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION_TYPE NDPT
WHERE NDPT.BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD=SDCH.PROMO_TYPE)
